item.title: People quitting jobs because of crappy boss dump
item.description:
My new favorite retort. Eat. My. Ass.
I've seen this one before, but love it.
I have wanted to use that phrase myself
We can sort this out = I need to cover my ass
item.dc:creator: Herebychoice

item.title: Every unit needs a good Medic
item.dc:creator: Randa829

item.title: Next level backing up skills
item.description: I think my dad would have watched this on repeat for half an hour, then show it to his friends all like; now this is how I try to tell my son to do it but he keeps turning the steering wheel the wrong way.
item.dc:creator: drestinblack

item.title: I present to you, Skweezy Jibbs
item.dc:creator: kickmyballsrealhard

item.title: "That is against my HIPAA law!!!"
item.description: And let's not let that amazing unintentional punchline distract from what an MVP that cashier is, pulling out the greatest "manager" response of all time. :D
item.dc:creator: peekitty

item.title: For the visual learners
item.description: We’re still feeling the ripples today, but some refuse to acknowledge this basic historical timeline.
item.dc:creator: TrumpsBrainCell

item.title: This poor kid lost 5 years of his life on a lie by the women who confessed the rape never happened.
item.description: He should have sued the women but he declined and chose to leave the past as the past. What a stand up young man.
item.dc:creator: Ice2Ice2

item.title: I am losing my best friend
item.description: I feel so helpless. I don't know what to do. Hug your loved ones. Tell them you love them. Don't wait. You don't have as long as you think. #FuckCancer
item.dc:creator: noripirg

item.title: Impressive
item.dc:creator: WeirdAlisMySpiritUserName

item.title: The best stickers I've ever seen on a vehicle
item.description: I ❤ my gay dog No baby on board, it's okay to crash into me This man ate my son
item.dc:creator: CeceIsMeMe

item.title: Day 259: of cheeseburgers I want inside of me
item.description: Savory Beef Patty, Bacon Relish, Swiss Cheese, Aioli, 3,000 Island Sauce On A Brioche Bun From THE CUT In Irvine, CA Thank You @sanooooo For This Burger Spot Submission 12/10 Previous Day 258: https://imgur.com/gallery/0y79z3Z MESSAGE ME BURGER PICS OR YOUR FAVORITE BURGER SPOTS! Map of all burger spots that are available on yelp! Big thanks to @OhBoyDoIHaveNews4U for this. Link to his post and map https://imgur.com/gallery/vcObDuD
item.dc:creator: crypto

item.description: Most ppl hate it here & Will NEVER leave :)

item.title: The only reason I watch curling.
item.description: As a Canadian I support the Canadian team but this guy make it very difficult not to root for Team USA. #hair #fabulous #curling #teamcanada

item.title: In light of the Bender news
item.description: By Andy Kluthe (@AndyKluthe on Twitter)
item.dc:creator: CaptnTightPants

item.title: Us at 8 and 16 and now at 14 and 22
item.description: I just found a load of old photos I thought I lost and realised we still sleep the same way. We now live in a flat rather than at home and she's grown up with me. She's the best cat I could ever ask for.
item.dc:creator: nettiegreen
